title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 01
desc: What happens when a fearless Delhi boy meets a fiery Mumbai girl? Chaos, charm, and clashes ensue. Will opposites attract or collide? Watch Alright's new weekly web series - Delhi vs Mumbai's episode 1 - When Delhi guy meets Mumbai girl.

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 02
desc: In this hilarious episode 2 of Delhi vs Mumbai, our favorite duo is on an all-too-relatable mission: flat hunting! ?? From endless negotiations with brokers in Delhi ?? to squeezing into Mumbai’s tiny flats ???, the chaos is real. Will Chirag find his home in this city or not?

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 03
desc: Imagine living with your crush amidst the iconic Delhi vs Mumbai clash—where one city’s chaos meets the other’s charm, turning every day into a blend of cultures and a rom-com adventure. Sharing breakfasts, late-night talks, and unexpected quirks, is it a dream come true or a reality check? Living with your crush in such a whirlwind brings fantasy and reality head-to-head like never before!

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 04
desc: What happens when opposites fall in love? Chaos, comedy, or the ultimate love story? Delhi vs Mumbai—where one orders butter chicken, the other swears by vada pav. One speeds through wide highways, the other navigates traffic like an art form. From “Bhai” to “Banta hai,” their worlds clash in a battle of slang, street food, and stubborn pride. But here’s the twist—somehow, between the endless debates and culture shocks, sparks fly. Is it war, or is it love? Maybe, just maybe, it’s both.

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 05
desc: Say no to Valentine’s Day when your boyfriend is too romantic, and you’re the complete opposite! One loves grand gestures, the other prefers chill vibes—can love survive this Delhi vs Mumbai clash?

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 06
desc: When your partner is a walking green flag, every day feels like a rom-com—thoughtful gestures, endless support, and no unnecessary drama. From remembering your coffee order to hyping you up like their full-time job, they seem too good to be true. But in a world full of red flags, is it possible to find someone this perfect, or is there a twist waiting to unfold?

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 07
desc: Who truly has your back—your boyfriend or your best friend? ?? In this episode of Delhi vs Mumbai, we put relationships to the ultimate test! From loyalty checks to emotional dilemmas, watch as Delhi and Mumbai episode 7 to prove whose squad reigns supreme.

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 08
desc: When your partner cheats on you, the signs can be subtle or right in your face—but are they real, or just overthinking? A sudden change in behaviour, secretive texts, and those mysterious "work calls" at odd hours—are you reading too much between the lines or just ignoring the signs?

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 09
desc: Ex ki waapsi is always when you’ve finally moved on. The memories resurface, the what-ifs linger… but will you turn the page or reopen the book? Is it fate giving you another chance, or just a test to see if you’ve really moved on?

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 10
desc: Holi with Girlfriend is nothing short of magical—colours in the air, laughter in every splash, and love in every stolen glance. As you chase each other with vibrant hues, the world fades, leaving just the two of you in a whirlwind of playful mischief and stolen kisses. Amidst the chaos of colours, one thing is certain—her smile is the brightest shade of happiness.

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 11
desc: When your girlfriend wants to pay, it’s a true test of modern love—are you chivalrous enough to insist, or progressive enough to accept? The debate begins: Is it about equality, or does footing the bill define a gentleman? The waiter awkwardly stands by as you both exchange glances, waiting to see who taps the card first. In the end, is love about splitting everything equally, or about knowing when to let the other person win?

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 12
desc: Ruhaani from Mumbai travels to Delhi to meet Chirag’s family—who also happens to be her boyfriend. As she navigates the warmth and chaos of Delhi's culture, she uncovers surprising truths about his family, their expectations, and where she truly stands in his life.

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 13
desc: In Episode 13, Ruhani’s lavish surprise for Chirag collides with his secret plan to move back to Delhi for his mother and a major opportunity, leading to an emotional confrontation that tests their love and leaves both with a bittersweet, unsent goodbye.

title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 14
desc: In the gripping final episode of Delhi vs Mumbai, emotions run high as Chirag (Abhishek Kapoor) and Ruhani (Malhaar Rathod) face the ultimate test of love. With tough decisions about career, family, and their future together, will distance and city-based differences pull them apart — or will love triumph over all?

title: Dude Ep 01
desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.
